name: epi-logos
description: Pi activation bundle for the Epi-Logos plugin: SwarmVault-first writing, individual Epi-Logos skills, canonical resources, and vault governance.

native_contract.swarmvault_3_12_0: SwarmVault installs Pi rules into AGENTS.md only. This bundle supplies the Epi-Logos plugin activation surface around that shared Pi agent file.

activation_order: Load using-epi-logos first, then route to the specific Epi-Logos skill required by the task.
Use SwarmVault query, graph, context, task, review, and lint commands before broad raw-source search.
